WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date <= '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
client_accounts AS (
    SELECT d.client_id, t.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
),
balance_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        client_id,
        (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan) AND date <= '1998-1...

WITH FirstApprovedLoan1993 AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        l.date AS loan_date
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.status = 'A' 
      AND l.date BETWEEN '1993-07-05' AND '1993-12-31'
    ORDER BY l.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
ClientAccount AS (
    SELECT 
        d.client_id,
        t.account_id
    FROM disp d
    INNER JOIN FirstApprovedLoan1993 fal ON d.account_id = fal.account_id
    INNER JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = fal.account_id
),
